assessorQuestions: ¿Cómo te llamas y cuántos años tienes?
¿Qué idiomas hablas y cuál estás aprendiendo ahora?
¿Cuáles son tus planes e intenciones para el futuro?

guestQuestions: ¿El hotel está cerca de la Alhambra?
¿Hay servicio de habitaciones por la noche?
¿Podemos dejar el equipaje después del check-out?
checklist: Use the 'dejarse sorprender por' slogan formula
Describe the architecture and style
Present the featured room with all details (furniture + bathroom)
Mention the shuttle service and price
Present the extra facility with hours and pricing
State the target audience
Answer ALL guest questions — include at least one NO answer
Use formal usted register throughout

data.walkIn: No reservation — requested room(s) not available. Suggest alternative: a standard room with patio view at €160/night

hotelInfo.label: Concierge
hotelInfo.detail: Alhambra tickets arranged — book 48hrs in advance

checklist: Greet the guest warmly in Spanish
Ask for name / confirm or identify reservation
Confirm room type, nights, number of guests
Ask for ID / passport
For walk-ins: apologise, explain unavailability, offer alternative with price
Hand over room key, state room number
Share relevant hotel information
Wish them a pleasant stay (¡Que disfrute su estancia!)

data.noTableSituation: No tables currently available (terrace fully booked until 22:30). Suggest the private lounge area with complimentary welcome drink while waiting.

dishOfDay.name: Cordero lechal asado
dishOfDay.ingredients: slow-roasted suckling lamb, rosemary, garlic, white wine jus
dishOfDay.cookingMethod: roasted in a traditional clay oven
dishOfDay.flavourTexture: incredibly tender, melts in the mouth, with rich and aromatic flavours

checklist: Greet the guests warmly at the entrance
Check reservation system — identify or seat the guests
If no table available: apologise, give waiting time, suggest alternative
Accompany guests to their table
Present the menu and recommend the dish of the day (with description)
Take the order professionally
Check on guests during the meal
Handle any requests or questions politely
